name: Raging Battleground
text: Reaction: After this province is revealed, choose a non-unique character with no fate on it – discard that character.

name: Appealing to the Fortunes
text:
This province gets +2 strength while you have a Void role.
Interrupt: When this province is broken – put a character into play from one of your provinces or from your hand.

name: Tainted Hero
text:
This character cannot be declared as an attacker or defender.
Action: Sacrifice a (friendly) character – until the end of the phase, treat this character's printed text box as if it were blank (except for Traits).

name: Kuni Laboratory
text:
Each character you control gets +1[mil] and +1[pol].
Forced Reaction: After the conflict phase begins – lose 1 honor.

name: Callow Delegate
text: Interrupt: When this character leaves play, choose a character you control – honor that character.

name: Togashi Mitsu
text:
Covert.
Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a Monk, Tattoo, or Kihō card in your conflict discard pile – play that card as if it were in your hand. If it is an event, put it on the bottom of your conflict deck instead of into your discard pile after resolving its effects.

name: Tactician's Apprentice
text: Reaction: After honor dials are revealed, if your bid is lower than an opponent's – draw 1 card. (Limit once per phase.)

name: Matsu Mitsuko
text: Action: During a [mil] conflict, if you are more honorable than your opponent, choose a character you control – move that character to the conflict.

name: Ethereal Dreamer
text: Reaction: After the conflict phase begins, choose a ring – until the end of the phase, this character gets +2[mil] and +2[pol] while that ring is being contested.

name: Bustling Academy
text: Action: If you control a Scholar character – discard a card in a province and refill it faceup.

name: Iuchi Shahai
text:
Covert.
Reduce the cost by 1 to play each Meishōdō attachment on this character or a neutral character.

name: Imperial Librarian
text:
Fire role only.
Each other character gets +1 glory.

name: Game of Sadane
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character you control and a participating character your opponent controls – your character challenges the opponent's character to a [pol] duel. Honor the duel's winner and dishonor the duel's loser.

name: Void Fist
text: Action: During a conflict, if you have played at least 2 other cards this conflict, choose a participating character with equal or lower [mil] skill than a participating Monk character you control – move the chosen character home and bow it.

name: All and Nothing
text: Interrupt: When you would resolve the [void] ring effect, choose another ring – resolve that ring's effect instead. Draw 1 card.

name: Shosuro Sadako
text: While this character is dishonored, add its glory to its [mil] and [pol] skill instead of subtracting it.

name: Mark of Shame
text:
Air role only.
Reaction: After you play this attachment – dishonor attached character. Then, dishonor it again.

name: Discourage Pursuit
text:
Earth role only.
Action: Dishonor a (friendly) Shinobi character. Choose a participating character – until the end of the conflict, that character gets -4[mil].

name: Dispatch
text:
Limited. (No more than one limited card can be played by each player each round.)
Action: Move a  character you control into a conflict or home from a conflict.

name: Perfect Land Ethos
text: Action: Discard each status token.
